seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Shoal Bay and Shoalhaven Heads. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Shoal Bay vs Shoalhaven Heads: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shoal Bay and Shoalhaven Heads.
heading: Shoal Bay vs Shoalhaven Heads — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shoal Bay, New South Wales and Shoalhaven Heads, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shoalhaven Heads has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Shoal Bay (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shoal Bay or Shoalhaven Heads safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shoal Bay has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Shoalhaven Heads scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shoal Bay scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Shoalhaven Heads scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shoal Bay or Shoalhaven Heads?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shoalhaven Heads has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
